---
title: "Richard Samuelson"
image: images/richardsamuelson.jpg
start_year: 2024
date: 1/1/2024
published-title: "Lab Member Since:"
about:
  template: solana
  links:
    - icon: Github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/samuelsonric
    - text: Website
      href: https://richardsamuelson.com
filters:
  - ../lua/auto-gallery.lua
---

is a doctoral student researching category theory, convex analysis, and
high‑performance computing. He has made significant contributions to the
**[CliqueTrees.jl](https://github.com/AlgebraicJulia/CliqueTrees.jl)** package,
implementing the ChordalLDLt multifrontal factorisation that underpins sparse
symmetric positive‑definite linear solves. These improvements accelerate
nullspace and global‑section computations in the
**[CellularSheaves.jl](https://github.com/AlgebraicJulia/CellularSheaves.jl)**
library and enable more efficient compositional methods across the lab's
projects.

### Selected publications

- **Graphical Quadratic Algebra** -- ICTAC 2025 (Lecture Notes in Computer
  Science). Dario Stein, Fabio Zanasi, Robin Piedeleu, and Richard Samuelson.
  DOI:
  [10.1007/978-3-032-11176-0_18](https://doi.org/10.1007/978-3-032-11176-0_18)
- **A Categorical Treatment of Open Linear Systems** -- *Logical Methods in
  Computer Science*, 2025. Dario Stein and Richard Samuelson. DOI:
  [10.46298/lmcs-21(3:11)2025](https://doi.org/10.46298/lmcs-21(3:11)2025)
